task_updates.executor_notes: Added resolver dispatch wiring via a registry lookup in `create-task/index.ts`, building `ResolverContext` with `supabaseAdmin`, `projectId`, `aspectRatio`, and `logger`, and preserving the existing raw parser/insert path when `body.family` is absent. Also preserved request-level idempotency handling for resolver-shaped requests. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Requests with `body.family` now route through `getTaskFamilyResolver(...)`; when `family` is absent, the function still skips resolver parsing and falls back to `parseCreateTaskBody(...)` plus the existing raw insert flow unchanged. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed after the dispatch changes.
